name: Win-beams

name: Win-bhop
author: UberMetroid
description: Cyberpunk Neon Pink and Cyan Hacker TUI with a scrolling live Bhop game panel.

author: UberMetroid
description: Majestic Doom fire simulation sweeping upward.

name: Win-matrix

name: Win-pour

name: Win-unstable

description: A purple Windows logo exploding outward into chaotic particles and snapping back.
